name: Compensation Red Flags
description: Compensation transparency and alignment with staff/principal market expectations.
signals_positive: transparent compensation range, top-of-range meets target minimum, staff/principal market rate
signals_negative: equity-only compensation, unpaid or volunteer, below market for principal-level, hourly contractor rate far below salary

name: Culture & Work Model
description: Remote-first culture, work-life balance, and engineering autonomy indicators.
signals_positive: remote-first, async-first, work-life balance, engineering autonomy, written communication culture, high-trust low-chaos
signals_negative: mandatory return-to-office, 4+ days on-site, 60+ hour weeks, military-style command, fast-paced high-pressure, ambiguous expectations

name: Employment Structure
description: Direct hire vs. staffing agency/contract positions.
signals_negative: staffing agency, contract-to-hire, vendor chain, W2 through third party, corp-to-corp

name: Ethical Alignment
description: Company mission alignment with humane and privacy-respecting values.
signals_positive: mission-driven, humane impact, privacy-respecting, healthcare, education, public-good
signals_negative: weapons manufacturing, military contracting, surveillance technology, behavioral profiling, predatory lending

name: Industry Alignment
description: Company mission and product category alignment with candidate interests.
signals_positive: developer tools, AI/ML, data infrastructure, open source, cloud platform

name: Neurodivergence Compatibility
description: Structured processes, predictable workflows, and low-meeting culture for neurodivergent-friendly work environments.
signals_positive: clear communication norms, structured processes, predictable workflows, low-meeting culture, async-first, psychological safety
signals_negative: constant context switching, interrupt-driven, ambiguity without support, high-meeting culture, synchronous dependency, chaotic environment

name: Operational Burden
description: On-call/SRE load vs. platform engineering focus.
signals_positive: platform engineering, build tools, developer experience, automation
signals_negative: 24/7 on-call, pager duty primary, incident commander rotation, SRE-heavy

name: Role Scope
description: Cross-team influence and architectural reach vs. narrow single-team execution.
signals_positive: cross-team, architectural influence, system design ownership, technical strategy
signals_negative: ticket taker, narrow scope, single feature team, no design authority

name: Seniority Mismatch
description: Role level vs. candidate expectations for staff+ positions.
signals_positive: staff, principal, distinguished, fellow, architect, VP engineering, director
signals_negative: junior, entry-level, associate, new grad, 0-2 years experience, intern

name: Technical Depth
description: Infrastructure and platform work vs. web/feature dev.
signals_positive: infrastructure, platform, distributed systems, systems programming, performance engineering
signals_negative: WordPress, Squarespace, basic CRUD, landing pages, no-code
